metadata.engine: V6.2 Adaptive Exposure Decision Layer Design Audit
metadata.source_exposure_engine: V5.1 Adaptive Exposure Policy Simulation Foundation
metadata.source_gradient_engine: V5.10 Exposure Context Risk Gradient Analysis
metadata.purpose: Audit research-only decision context labels without changing exposure policy.

evidence.reason: V6.2 creates research labels only; no exposure level, mapper, weight, ETF, or trade change.

summary.key_read: Decision context labels are interpretable, but they do not yet separate risk or opportunity enough to support any exposure policy change.

social_financing_growth.source: data/macro/social_financing_growth.json
